headline: Assessing General Motors (GM) Valuation As Analyst Debate Intensifies Ahead Earnings
summary: Analyst debate puts General Motors (GM) in the spotlight ahead of earnings Recent analyst moves at Deutsche Bank, Goldman Sachs, and UBS have pushed General Motors (GM) back into focus, as differing views on trade policy, input costs, and China demand sharpen attention on the upcoming earnings update. See our latest analysis for General Motors. GM shares trade at US$78.05 after a recent 1-month share price return of 5.42%, while the 1-year total shareholder return of 76.9% and 3-year total...
